column7: Found components can be sold for about 50% of their cost
Rarer components are harder to sell and may fetch less than 20% of final sale price
Example: Selling dirt of a dragon's footprint to a magic shop might only net the finder 100cp.

column12: Can be created with a strip of leather, a bless spell, and an 8 hour ritual in a holy place. 1 bless + 1 leather = 1 blessed leather
